member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety
member.summary: Command to create a new society along with its initial social contract.
member.param: The participant creating the society.
The name of the society.
The description of the society.
The initial tags for the society.
The decision protocol ratification threshold.
The decision protocol review window in hours.
Whether veto is allowed in the decision protocol.
The required verification weight for epistemic rules.
Optional geographic bounds for the society.
Optional center coordinates for the society.

member.summary: Command to create a new society along with its initial social contract.
member.param: The participant creating the society.
The name of the society.
The description of the society.
The initial tags for the society.
The decision protocol ratification threshold.
The decision protocol review window in hours.
Whether veto is allowed in the decision protocol.
The required verification weight for epistemic rules.
Optional geographic bounds for the society.
Optional center coordinates for the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.CreatedBy
member.summary: The participant creating the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.Name
member.summary: The name of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.Description
member.summary: The description of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.Tags
member.summary: The initial tags for the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.RatificationThreshold
member.summary: The decision protocol ratification threshold.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.ReviewWindowHours
member.summary: The decision protocol review window in hours.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.AllowVeto
member.summary: Whether veto is allowed in the decision protocol.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.RequiredVerificationWeight
member.summary: The required verification weight for epistemic rules.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.GeographicBounds
member.summary: Optional geographic bounds for the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSociety.Center
member.summary: Optional center coordinates for the society.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.CreateSocietyHandler
member.summary: Handles the command by creating a and its initial .
Handles a command, persisting both the society and its initial social contract.
member.param: The command to handle.
Repository for staging the society.
Repository for staging the social contract.
Unit of work for committing the transaction.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The identifier of the newly created society.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Commands.JoinSociety
member.summary: Command to join a society.
member.param: The society to join.
The participant joining the society.
The social contract the participant is agreeing to.

member.summary: Handles the command.

member.summary: Handles a command, adding a participant membership to the society.
member.param: The command to handle.
Repository for loading and staging the society.
Unit of work for committing the transaction.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The identifier of the newly created membership.

Repository for loading and staging the society.
Unit of work for committing the transaction.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Queries.GetCurrentSocialContractId
member.summary: Query to retrieve the current social contract ID for a society.
member.param: The ID of the society.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Queries.GetCurrentSocialContractId.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.SocietyId)
member.summary: Query to retrieve the current social contract ID for a society.
member.param: The ID of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Queries.GetCurrentSocialContractId.SocietyId
member.summary: The ID of the society.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Queries.GetCurrentSocialContractIdHandler
member.summary: Handles the query.

member.summary: Returns the current social contract ID for the given society, or if none exists.
member.param: The query containing the society ID.
Marten query session for read-model access.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: The social contract ID string, or if not found.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.Queries.GetParticipantSocietyIds
member.summary: Query to retrieve the IDs of all societies a participant is an active member of.

member.summary: Query to retrieve the IDs of all societies a participant is an active member of.

member.summary: Handles the query.

member.summary: Returns the society IDs of all societies the participant is currently an active member of.
member.param: The query containing the participant ID.
Marten query session for read-model access.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: An array of society ID strings.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocialContractView
member.summary: Lightweight read model for a social contract, used to look up the current contract for a society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocialContractView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the social contract.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocialContractView.SocietyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the ID of the society this contract belongs to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocialContractView.EstablishedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this social contract was established.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView
member.summary: Read model for a society in a paginated list.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this society was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the tags associated with this society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.HasGeographicBounds
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this society has geographic bounds.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyListItemView.ActiveMemberCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of active members.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView
member.summary: Read model for a single active member of a society, keyed by membership ID.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the membership identifier (used as the document key).

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.SocietyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the society identifier.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.ParticipantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the participant identifier.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.SocialContractId
member.summary: Gets or sets the social contract identifier agreed to at join time.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.JoinedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the participant joined.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyMemberView.IsActive
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this membership is currently active. Set to when the participant leaves.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyRelationshipView
member.summary: Read model for a society relationship embedded in .

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyRelationshipView.TargetSocietyId
member.summary: Gets or sets the target society ID.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyRelationshipView.RelationshipType
member.summary: Gets or sets the relationship type name.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView
member.summary: Full read model for a single society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.CreatedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets the participant ID of the creator.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this society was created.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the tags associated with this society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.HasGeographicBounds
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether this society has geographic bounds.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.GeographicBoundsJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the geographic bounds JSON, if applicable.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.CenterJson
member.summary: Gets or sets the center coordinates JSON, if applicable.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.Relationships
member.summary: Gets or sets the relationships to other societies.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Application.ReadModels.SocietyView.ActiveMemberCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of active members.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol
member.summary: Value object representing the decision-making protocol for a social contract.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol.#ctor(System.Double,System.TimeSpan,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The percentage of total weight required to ratify a decision (e.g., 0.5 for 50%).
The duration an amendment must remain open for feedback or objection.
If true, a single principled objection can block a decision regardless of weight.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol.RatificationThreshold
member.summary: Gets the percentage of total participant weight required to ratify an amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol.ReviewWindow
member.summary: Gets the duration an amendment must remain open for feedback or objection.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol.AllowVeto
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether a single principled objection can block a decision.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.EpistemicRules
member.summary: Value object representing the epistemic rules that govern signal verification within a social contract.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.EpistemicRules.#ctor(System.Double)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The minimum verification weight required for signals.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.EpistemicRules.RequiredVerificationWeight
member.summary: Gets the minimum verification weight required for signals to be considered valid.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended
member.summary: Domain event raised when a social contract is amended.
member.param: The ID of the social contract.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The participant ID who made the amendment.
The new ratification threshold, or null if unchanged.
The new review window in ticks, or null if unchanged.
The new veto flag, or null if unchanged.
The new required verification weight, or null if unchanged.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Double})
member.summary: Domain event raised when a social contract is amended.
member.param: The ID of the social contract.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The participant ID who made the amendment.
The new ratification threshold, or null if unchanged.
The new review window in ticks, or null if unchanged.
The new veto flag, or null if unchanged.
The new required verification weight, or null if unchanged.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.AmendedBy
member.summary: The participant ID who made the amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.RatificationThreshold
member.summary: The new ratification threshold, or null if unchanged.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.ReviewWindowTicks
member.summary: The new review window in ticks, or null if unchanged.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.AllowVeto
member.summary: The new veto flag, or null if unchanged.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractAmended.RequiredVerificationWeight
member.summary: The new required verification weight, or null if unchanged.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractEstablished
member.summary: Domain event raised when a social contract is established for a society.
member.param: The ID of the social contract.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The ID of the society this contract belongs to.
The participant ID who established this contract.
The ratification threshold from the decision protocol.
The review window duration in ticks.
Whether veto is allowed.
The required verification weight from the epistemic rules.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractEstablished.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.Double,System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.Double)
member.summary: Domain event raised when a social contract is established for a society.
member.param: The ID of the social contract.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The ID of the society this contract belongs to.
The participant ID who established this contract.
The ratification threshold from the decision protocol.
The review window duration in ticks.
Whether veto is allowed.
The required verification weight from the epistemic rules.

member.summary: The ID of the society this contract belongs to.

member.summary: The participant ID who established this contract.

member.summary: The ratification threshold from the decision protocol.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractEstablished.ReviewWindowTicks
member.summary: The review window duration in ticks.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractEstablished.AllowVeto
member.summary: Whether veto is allowed.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.Events.SocialContractEstablished.RequiredVerificationWeight
member.summary: The required verification weight from the epistemic rules.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.ISocialContractRepository
member.summary: Repository interface for the aggregate.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract
member.summary: Aggregate root representing a social contract — the rules of governance for a society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.SocietyId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the society this social contract belongs to.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.EstablishedBy
member.summary: Gets the participant who established this social contract.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.EstablishedAt
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when this social contract was established.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.Protocol
member.summary: Gets the decision protocol for this social contract.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.EpistemicRules
member.summary: Gets the epistemic rules for this social contract.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.Establish(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.SocietyId,BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol,BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.EpistemicRules)
member.summary: Establishes a new social contract for a society.
member.param: The society this contract governs.
The participant establishing the contract.
The decision protocol.
The epistemic rules.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContract.Amend(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId,BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.DecisionProtocol,BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.EpistemicRules)
member.summary: Amends the social contract. At least one of or must be non-null.
member.param: The participant making the amendment.
The new decision protocol, or null to keep the current one.
The new epistemic rules, or null to keep the current ones.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.SocialContracts.SocialContractId
member.summary: Unique identifier for a .

member.summary: Domain event raised when a participant joins a society.

member.summary: The ID of the social contract agreed to.

member.summary: Domain event raised when a participant leaves a society.

member.summary: Domain event raised when a participant leaves a society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.Societies.Events.MemberLeft.ParticipantId

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.Societies.Events.SocietyCreated
member.summary: Domain event raised when a new society is created.
member.param: The ID of the created society.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The name of the society.
The description of the society.
The participant ID of the creator.
The initial tags for the society.
The geographic bounds as a JSON string, or null if not geographic.
The center coordinates as a JSON string, or null if not geographic.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.Societies.Events.SocietyCreated.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Domain event raised when a new society is created.
member.param: The ID of the created society.
The aggregate version when this event was raised.
The name of the society.
The description of the society.
The participant ID of the creator.
The initial tags for the society.
The geographic bounds as a JSON string, or null if not geographic.
The center coordinates as a JSON string, or null if not geographic.

member.summary: Unique identifier for a entity.

member.summary: Aggregate root representing a society — a self-governing group of participants.

member.summary: Gets the name of the society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.Societies.Society.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tags associated with this society.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Societies.Domain.Societies.Society.Memberships
member.summary: Gets the memberships in this society.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Societies.Infrastructure.Seeding.SocietiesInitialData
member.summary: Development-only initial data seeding for the Societies bounded context. Seeds a single society with a social contract and participant memberships using domain aggregates. Seed content is loaded from the embedded seed-data.json resource.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Infrastructure.Seeding.SocietiesInitialData.#ctor(BindingChaos.SharedKernel.Domain.ParticipantId[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The ordered participant array shared across all seeders.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Societies.Infrastructure.Seeding.SocietiesInitialData.Populate(Marten.IDocumentStore,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Populates initial development data for Societies.
member.param: The Marten document store.
A token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
